insertText.text:
What Changed Since Last Run

- FLORA published A new pricing model for FLORA, plus Nano Banana on us on May 5, 2026, moving from credits to dollar-denominated pricing and making Nano Banana 2 and Nano Banana Pro free through July 1, 2026. Source: FLORA pricing update
- OpenArt posted a 2026-05-06 pricing/package update on its What's New surface offering unlimited generations on Wonder and Infinite plans plus 50% off Wonder Annual through May 15. Source: OpenArt What's New

Coverage Checked

- Tracked competitors reviewed in this pass: 3dinternet, Adobe Firefly, Artlabs, Canva AI, ComfyUI, Ecomtent, Fotor, Martech3d, Meta AI Image Generator, Mintly, Modelry, Moodnode, Narkis.ai, Neolemon, OpenArt, Pixeen, Purple Palm, Rawshot, Smartpixel, Soona, Spaces, Torus3d, Twikit, Vectary, Wan AI, Zolak, Glorify, Homedesigns AI, Miricanvas, Paintit AI, Simplified, Freepik AI, Ideogram, Krea, Leonardo AI, Midjourney, Nightcafe, Playground, Recraft, Runway, Wave AI, Artlist, Figma Weave, Flora AI, Higgsfield, Jasper, Luma AI, Combos, Godot, Loopit, Mwm AI, Emergent, Gdevelop, Ludo, Makko, Replit, Roblox, Rosebud, Alai, Beautiful AI, Buildbox, Chatslide, Chronicle, Deckrobot, Decky AI, Dialoguetrainer, Doppel Games, Gamma, Gemini Canvas, Genspark, Manus, Mursion, Napkin AI, Notegpt, Omma, Pitch, Plus AI, Prezent AI, Prezi, Quillbot, Rolelab, Second Nature, Simmie, Skillsoft Caisy, Slidesai, Slidesgpt, Spline, Virti, Visme, Yoodli, Hyper3d, Marble, Meshy, Pentopix, Spaitial, Spatial, Trellis 3D, Worldgen, Wunderparc, Draftly.
- Browser-assisted official-source sweep checked known homepage, product, pricing, blog/news, changelog, docs, launch, and parent/provider surfaces where available, with direct material-hit verification on FLORA, OpenArt, Runway, Canva, Krea, Adobe Firefly, Meta AI, Google model-provider surfaces, OpenAI image surfaces, Meshy, Spline, and ComfyUI; no additional material launch, pricing, packaging, acquisition, valuation, or positioning hit surfaced in this run beyond the items above.
- Third-party funding/news sweep checked across PitchBook, Crunchbase, CB Insights, TechCrunch, PremierAlts, Growjo, Wellfound, Bloomberg, and Reuters; no material tracked-company funding, valuation, acquisition, or market-structure hit surfaced in this pass beyond previously known items.
- No usable public official update surface was verified in this pass for a direct official-source review on Neolemon and Playground.
